ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., FL, MA, IN) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state's centroid */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for each cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidence_rates" (
  "incidence_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incidence rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the incidence rate is calculated */,
  "rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted incidence rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* 95% confidence interval for the rate */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology used to calculate the incidence rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incidence_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "confidence_interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval */,
  "incidence_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incidence rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the confidence interval is calculated */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_intervals_incidence_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("incidence_rate_id") REFERENCES incidence_rates ("incidence_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ranking is calculated */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state based on the incidence rate */,
  "confidence_interval_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the state based on the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_annual_counts" (
  "average_annual_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average annual count */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the average annual count is calculated */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Average annual count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_annual_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_annual_counts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_annual_counts_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recent_trends" (
  "recent_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recent trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the recent trend is calculated */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Recent trend (e.g., stable, falling, rising) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* 95% confidence interval for the trend */,
  "trend_start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend period */,
  "trend_end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recent_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recent_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recent_trends_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recent_5_year_trends" (
  "recent_5_year_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recent 5-year trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the recent 5-year trend is calculated */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Recent 5-year trend (e.g., stable, falling, rising) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* 95% confidence interval for the trend */,
  "trend_start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend period */,
  "trend_end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recent_5_year_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recent_5_year_trends_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recent_5_year_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_tools" (
  "reporting_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting tool */,
  "reporting_tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each reporting tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "data_visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the data visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each data visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_visualization_id")
)
